item.title: A Pair of Aces with Victoria Christopher Murray and Marie Benedict
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Eldorado Ballroom, 2310 Elgin Street, Houston, TX, 77004

Join us to celebrate Victoria Christopher Murray and Marie Benedict's latest release A Pair of Aces.

Event details

item.title: The Missed Connection with Tia Williams
item.description:

item.title: Daggermouth with H.M. Wolfe
item.description:
Friday, July 31, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Holy Family HTX Episcopal Church, 3719 Navigation Boulevard, Houston, TX, 77003

Join us to celebrate H.M. Wolfe's latest release Daggermouth!

item.title: The Siren with Tomi Adeyemi
item.description:
Wednesday, September 30, 2026 at 7 PM
